product_type.description: Door Handle vs Handle Cover vs Mirror Trim

cab.description: Crew Cab vs Extended Cab → reject; cab absent → skip

bed_length.description: Short Bed vs Long Bed → reject; absent → skip

year_range.description: Year range with zero overlap → reject; partial overlap → soft penalty

product_semantics.description: Cover/Overlay vs Replacement → hard reject (fundamentally different product)

attachment_type.description: Adhesive/Stick-on vs Bolt-on/Clip-on → hard reject (different installation mechanism)

position.description: Position mismatch → penalty but no reject (sellers often write wrong position)

year_partial.description: Year range partially overlaps → moderate penalty

cab_absent.description: Cab not mentioned in candidate → tiny penalty

bed_length_absent.description: Bed length not mentioned in candidate → tiny penalty

oe_fast_pass.description: OE/OEM/Interchange part number match → skip all rules, direct approve, similarity=1.0

seo_spam.description: Titles mentioning ≥2 different ontology families → flag as SEO spam

universal_detect.description: Flag but do not reject (valuable for market insights)
